name: KRL Bogor Line Schedule Candidate (Local Only)
source_name: KAI Commuter official website schedule API
limitations: Local-only app data; not cleared for redistribution or deployment.
Schedule license and reuse terms are unknown.
OpenStreetMap geometry is ODbL-licensed and attribution/share-alike obligations are not configured for deployment.
Source is website API schedule JSON, not a GTFS feed.
Only full Bogor to Jakarta Kota and Jakarta Kota to Bogor terminal services are included.
Terminal departure and arrival times use sourced KCI API rows.
Intermediate stop times are derived by scaling representative official train-schedule offsets to each sourced terminal runtime.
Trips and calendars are locally derived and are not official GTFS service records.
